channel.title: Comments for page "Explained SCPs - Tales Edition"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Explained SCPs - Tales Edition"

item.title: Explained SCPs Tales Edition is up!
item.content:encoded:
I don't think the Explained SCPs get enough love, so this'll hopefully allow you to read all there is to offer regarding these often awesome SCPs! It's small now, so hopefully it'll grow in the future. This is open to editing, so put tales here as you see fit regarding -EX articles.

Happy reading!
